### Goals and assists

```{r ucw1}
p_w1 <- viz_wyscout_goals_assists(
  pms,
  match_id = match_id,
  title = chart_titles$wyscout_goals_assists,
  subtitle = subtitle,
  team_labels = team_labels
)
print(p_w1)
save_figure(
  p_w1,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Wyscout_Goals_Assists_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "16_9"
)
```

### Minutes played

```{r ucw2}
p_w2 <- viz_wyscout_minutes_played(
  pms,
  match_id = match_id,
  title = chart_titles$wyscout_minutes,
  subtitle = subtitle,
  fill_colors = team_colors
)
print(p_w2)
save_figure(
  p_w2,
  file.path(fig_dir, paste0("Wyscout_Minutes_", slug, ".png")),
  format = "16_9"
)
```

*Event-level charts (shots maps, pass maps, heatmaps) require an event stream. This Wyscout bundle provides player and team aggregates only.*

---

Figures saved to: `r fig_dir`
